mapper.insert: insert into schedule (movie_id, cinema_id, hall_id, show_date, show_time, end_time, price, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{movieId}, #{cinemaId}, #{hallId}, #{showDate}, #{showTime}, #{endTime}, #{price}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update schedule
movie_id = #{movieId},
cinema_id = #{cinemaId},
hall_id = #{hallId},
show_date = #{showDate},
show_time = #{showTime},
end_time = #{endTime},
price = #{price},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select s.*, m.name as movie_name, m.image as movie_image, c.name as cinema_name, h.name as hall_name, (h.total_seats - (select count(*) from ticket_detail td join ticket t on td.ticket_id = t.id where t.schedule_id = s.id and t.status != 3)) as available_seats from schedule s left join movie m on s.movie_id = m.id left join cinema c on s.cinema_id = c.id left join hall h on s.hall_id = h.id where s.id = #{id}

select s.*, m.name as movie_name, m.image as movie_image, c.name as cinema_name, h.name as hall_name, (h.total_seats - (select count(*) from ticket_detail td join ticket t on td.ticket_id = t.id where t.schedule_id = s.id and t.status != 3)) as available_seats from schedule s left join movie m on s.movie_id = m.id left join cinema c on s.cinema_id = c.id left join hall h on s.hall_id = h.id where s.status = 1 order by s.show_date, s.show_time

select s.*, m.name as movie_name, m.image as movie_image, c.name as cinema_name, h.name as hall_name, (h.total_seats - (select count(*) from ticket_detail td join ticket t on td.ticket_id = t.id where t.schedule_id = s.id and t.status != 3)) as available_seats from schedule s left join movie m on s.movie_id = m.id left join cinema c on s.cinema_id = c.id left join hall h on s.hall_id = h.id where s.movie_id = #{movieId} and s.show_date >= #{date} and s.status = 1 order by s.show_date, s.show_time

select s.*, m.name as movie_name, m.image as movie_image, c.name as cinema_name, h.name as hall_name, (h.total_seats - (select count(*) from ticket_detail td join ticket t on td.ticket_id = t.id where t.schedule_id = s.id and t.status != 3)) as available_seats from schedule s left join movie m on s.movie_id = m.id left join cinema c on s.cinema_id = c.id left join hall h on s.hall_id = h.id where s.cinema_id = #{cinemaId} and s.show_date >= #{date} and s.status = 1 order by s.show_date, s.show_time
